description: Happy path: gate a well-formed content-lane caption artifact that should pass all dimensions

input.artifact: Just found this gorgeous brass candelabra at a flea market for $8. The patina is perfect for that moody, lived-in look on my dining table. Would you keep the patina or polish it? Tell me in the comments.
input.request: Write an Instagram Reel caption for a brass candelabra thrift find

prohibit: verdict is Released when hard_fail is true
any score dimension missing from the scores object
verdict value other than Released or Not released

description: Minimal input: gate a pipeline_crm deal transition record

input.request: Advance deal_moodycandle_co_002 from outreach-sent to in-discussion

expect.scores: object with all 9 dimension keys present

prohibit: verdict is Released when any dimension is below threshold and hard_fail is true
scores object missing any of the 9 required dimensions
composite calculated incorrectly relative to scores

description: Edge case: artifact contains fabricated metrics, should trigger a hard fail on integrity or accuracy

input.artifact: This vintage dresser flip got 1.2M views and a 14% CTR, proving our method works every time. Our engagement rate is 3x the industry average.
input.request: Write a media kit performance summary paragraph

expect.fixes: non-empty array with at least one fix referencing fabricated metrics or unverified claims

prohibit: verdict is Released when the artifact contains fabricated performance metrics
hard_fail is false when integrity or accuracy should fail due to fabrication
fixes is empty when the artifact contains invented data
fixes that do not mention the specific fabrication issue
